_metadata.title: Complete Accounts and Credentials Checklist
_metadata.description: Structured checklist of all accounts, credentials, IDs, and values needed for the n8n Job Automation workflow

accounts_to_create.purpose: Create OAuth credentials for Google Sheets and Gmail access
accounts_to_create.what_you_get: OAuth Client ID and Client Secret
accounts_to_create.where_to_save: Used in n8n Gmail and Sheets OAuth2 credentials
accounts_to_create.notes: One project handles both Gmail accounts

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Use existing Gmail or create new (e.g., raviintouch2@gmail.com)
accounts_to_create.purpose: Primary email account for job outreach (first 50 emails/day)

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Use existing Gmail or create new (e.g., ravitejavallakatla7@gmail.com)
accounts_to_create.purpose: Second email account for job outreach (next 50 emails/day)
accounts_to_create.notes: Can use same OAuth client as Account 1

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Use existing Gmail or create new (e.g., ravitejav081@gmail.com)
accounts_to_create.purpose: Third email account for job outreach (next 50 emails/day)
accounts_to_create.notes: Can use same OAuth client as Accounts 1 & 2

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Use existing Gmail or create new (e.g., ravitejav0801@gmail.com)
accounts_to_create.purpose: Fourth email account for job outreach (final 50 emails/day)
accounts_to_create.notes: Can use same OAuth client as Accounts 1-3. Total capacity: 200 emails/day

accounts_to_create.purpose: Primary AI key for job scoring and email generation
Second AI key for rotation
Third AI key for rotation
Fourth AI key for rotation (total: 57,600 requests/day)

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Use your Google account, authorize in n8n
accounts_to_create.purpose: Primary Sheets credential (300 writes/day)

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Same Google account, authorize again in n8n
accounts_to_create.purpose: Second Sheets credential for rotation
accounts_to_create.notes: Can use same Google account as Credential 1

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Same Google account, authorize again in n8n
accounts_to_create.purpose: Third Sheets credential for rotation
accounts_to_create.notes: Can use same Google account as Credentials 1 & 2

accounts_to_create.signup_method: Same Google account, authorize again in n8n
accounts_to_create.purpose: Fourth Sheets credential for rotation (total: 1,200 writes/day)
accounts_to_create.notes: Can use same Google account as Credentials 1-3

accounts_to_create.purpose: Database for storing all discovered jobs and tracking statuses
accounts_to_create.free_tier: Unlimited sheets, 5 million cells per sheet
accounts_to_create.where_to_save: Sheet ID in User Config node, credential in n8n

accounts_to_create.purpose: Interactive job assistant bot and notifications
accounts_to_create.what_you_get: Bot token and your chat ID
accounts_to_create.where_to_save: Token in n8n Telegram credential, chat ID in notification nodes

accounts_to_create.purpose: Job search API (one of three job sources)
accounts_to_create.where_to_save: Directly in 'Fetch Adzuna API' node query parameters

accounts_to_create.purpose: Publicly accessible URL for resume download and AI parsing
accounts_to_create.what_you_get: Public URL to your resume PDF
accounts_to_create.notes: Must be publicly accessible without login

accounts_to_create.purpose: Additional job API source (4th API in cascading fallback)
accounts_to_create.where_to_save: Directly in 'Fetch JSearch API' node headers
accounts_to_create.notes: Part of 7-API system with intelligent fallback

accounts_to_create.purpose: Additional job API source (5th API in cascading fallback)
accounts_to_create.notes: Already configured, works out of the box

accounts_to_create.purpose: Additional job API source (6th API in cascading fallback)
accounts_to_create.where_to_save: Directly in 'Fetch USAJobs API' node headers

accounts_to_create.purpose: Additional job API source (7th API in cascading fallback)
accounts_to_create.notes: Deprecated but still works; may stop in future

credentials_to_configure.name: Groq API
credentials_to_configure.how_to_obtain: Sign up at console.groq.com → API Keys → Create API Key
credentials_to_configure.verification: Execute any Groq node - should return AI response without auth errors

credentials_to_configure.name: Google Sheets OAuth2
credentials_to_configure.how_to_obtain: Google Cloud Console → Create OAuth client → Enable Sheets API
add_to_n8n_steps: 3. Paste Client ID and Client Secret
used_in_nodes: Append to Google Sheets: Jobs Tab
Read Jobs from Sheet for Outreach
credentials_to_configure.verification: Execute 'Read Existing Jobs from Sheet' - should read sheet data

credentials_to_configure.name: Gmail Primary OAuth2
credentials_to_configure.how_to_obtain: Use same OAuth client as Sheets, enable Gmail API, authorize PRIMARY account
add_to_n8n_steps: 3. Use same Client ID/Secret as Sheets
credentials_to_configure.verification: Send test email to yourself - check sender is primary account

credentials_to_configure.name: Gmail Secondary OAuth2
credentials_to_configure.how_to_obtain: Same OAuth client, authorize SECONDARY Gmail account
add_to_n8n_steps: 5. SELECT SECONDARY GMAIL ACCOUNT (different from primary)
credentials_to_configure.verification: Simulate primary exhaustion, verify email sent from secondary account

credentials_to_configure.name: Telegram Bot API
credentials_to_configure.verification: Send /start to your bot - should receive welcome message

ids_and_values.name: Google Spreadsheet ID
ids_and_values.where_to_find: Open your Google Sheet → Copy from URL between /d/ and /edit
ids_and_values.validation: 36-44 characters, alphanumeric with hyphens and underscores
where_to_use_in_workflow: User Config (Master Profile) node → sheetId field
ids_and_values.how_to_test: Open URL: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/YOUR_ID/edit - should open your sheet

ids_and_values.name: Telegram Chat ID
where_to_use_in_workflow: Send Telegram: Job Discovery Digest → chatId parameter
Email Account Switch Notification → chatId parameter
ids_and_values.how_to_test: Execute a Telegram send node with your chat ID - you should receive message

ids_and_values.name: Adzuna Application ID
ids_and_values.where_to_find: developer.adzuna.com → Dashboard → Your application → Application ID
where_to_use_in_workflow: Fetch Adzuna API → Query Parameters → app_id
ids_and_values.how_to_test: Execute Adzuna node - should return job listings without auth errors

ids_and_values.name: Adzuna Application Key
ids_and_values.where_to_find: developer.adzuna.com → Dashboard → Your application → Application Key
where_to_use_in_workflow: Fetch Adzuna API → Query Parameters → app_key
ids_and_values.how_to_test: Execute Adzuna node with both ID and key - should return results

ids_and_values.name: Resume Public URL
ids_and_values.where_to_find: Upload resume to Google Drive/GitHub/Dropbox → Get public sharing link → Convert format
ids_and_values.validation: Must be publicly accessible, downloads PDF without login
where_to_use_in_workflow: User Config (Master Profile) node → resumeUrl field
ids_and_values.how_to_test: Open URL in incognito browser - should download PDF file

ids_and_values.name: Primary Gmail Address
ids_and_values.where_to_find: Your main Gmail account email address
where_to_use_in_workflow: User Config (Master Profile) node → primaryEmail field
ids_and_values.notes: Must match the account authorized in primary Gmail credential

ids_and_values.name: Secondary Gmail Address
ids_and_values.where_to_find: Your backup Gmail account email address
ids_and_values.validation: Valid Gmail address, different from primary
where_to_use_in_workflow: User Config (Master Profile) node → secondaryEmail field
ids_and_values.notes: Must match the account authorized in secondary Gmail credential

ids_and_values.name: Your Personal Email
ids_and_values.where_to_find: Your personal email for receiving workflow notifications
where_to_use_in_workflow: User Config (Master Profile) node → userEmail field
ids_and_values.notes: Used for CC on outreach emails and digest emails

credential_mapping.description: Maps each credential to exact nodes in the workflow
credential_mapping.purpose: Helps you understand why each credential is needed and where it's used

nodes.purpose: Analyzes job descriptions and scores match against your profile (0-100), rotates through 4 keys
Creates customized outreach emails for each job and recruiter, rotates through 4 keys
Powers Telegram bot to answer questions about jobs, uses Key 1 primarily
Extracts skills, experience, and education from resume PDF, uses Key 1 primarily
Checks for duplicate jobs before adding new ones, rotates credentials
Adds newly discovered jobs to tracking sheet, rotates credentials

nodes.node_name: Read Jobs from Sheet for Outreach (Credential 1-4)
nodes.purpose: Retrieves jobs with 'New' status and recruiter emails, rotates credentials
Updates job status to 'Email Sent' after outreach, rotates credentials
Reads job data for Telegram /stats command, rotates credentials
Sends outreach emails using first Gmail account (first 50/day)
Backup email sender when Account 1 hits limit (next 50/day)
Third email sender when Accounts 1-2 exhausted (next 50/day)
Fourth email sender when Accounts 1-3 exhausted (final 50/day)
Sends daily summary of discovered jobs to your email, uses Account 1
Listens for messages sent to your bot (trigger node)
Sends daily summary of discovered jobs via Telegram
Responds to quick commands like /start and /help
Sends job statistics in response to /stats command
Sends simple text responses for basic commands
Alerts you when email failover occurs (primary to secondary switch)

google_sheet_setup.description: Required structure for your Google Sheets database
setup_steps: 2. Rename first tab from 'Sheet1' to 'Jobs' (exact name, case-sensitive)
3. In row 1, add all 19 column headers in order A-S
4. Leave row 2 onwards empty (workflow fills automatically)
6. Ensure the Google account used for OAuth has edit permission
critical_notes: Column order matters - workflow maps by position
Don't add extra columns between A-S
OK to add columns after S for custom tracking

optional_items.name: Custom Domain for Gmail
optional_items.how_to_setup: Register domain → Set up Google Workspace → Configure DNS

optional_items.name: Third Gmail Account
optional_items.how_to_setup: Create third Gmail → Add OAuth credential → Modify workflow switch logic

optional_items.name: Additional Job APIs
optional_items.required_for_feature: More job sources beyond Remotive, Arbeitnow, Adzuna

optional_items.name: Error Notification Workflow
optional_items.how_to_setup: n8n Settings → Error Workflow → Create error handler workflow

breakdown.task: Create accounts (Groq, Google Cloud, Telegram, Adzuna)
Configure OAuth credentials in Google Cloud
Configure user profile in User Config node

before_activation: All 5 credentials show green checkmark in n8n
All credential IDs copied and placeholders replaced
Google Sheet has 19 columns in correct order
Resume URL is publicly accessible (test in incognito)
User Config has all YOUR_ placeholders replaced
Test execution of job discovery runs successfully
after_activation: Check execution log after 8 AM UTC - job discovery ran
Google Sheet has new jobs from today
Check execution log after 9 AM UTC - email outreach ran
Verify emails in Gmail sent folder
No errors in execution logs for 3 consecutive days

monthly_cost_breakdown.sustainability: 100% free forever - no paid services required

troubleshooting_quick_reference.credential_errors: Verify credential IDs match in User Config and node settings
troubleshooting_quick_reference.oauth_redirect_mismatch: Check n8n URL matches Google Cloud OAuth redirect URI exactly
troubleshooting_quick_reference.sheet_not_found: Verify Sheet ID is correct and tab named 'Jobs'
troubleshooting_quick_reference.resume_download_fails: Ensure URL is public (test in incognito), use correct format
troubleshooting_quick_reference.telegram_bot_not_responding: Check bot token, verify workflow is active, test with /start
troubleshooting_quick_reference.adzuna_no_results: Use 2-letter country code (us, gb, in), verify both app_id and app_key
troubleshooting_quick_reference.emails_going_to_spam: Reduce daily limit to 30, warm up accounts gradually
troubleshooting_quick_reference.both_accounts_exhausted: Wait for midnight UTC reset or manually reset counts
troubleshooting_quick_reference.wrong_gmail_sending: Verify credential IDs match correct accounts in User Config
